title: Pork Skewers with Ukrainian Spices
description: A flavorful and spicy Ukrainian-inspired dish made with juicy pork skewers.

ingredients.name: pork shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: preferably with a bit of fat for juiciness

ingredients.name: spicy Ukrainian seasoning
ingredients.notes: store-bought or homemade blend of paprika, garlic, and caraway seeds

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: preferably wooden or metal for grilling

instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the Ukrainian seasoning, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the pork cubes to the marinade and mix well to coat.
4. Thread the marinated pork, onion, and bell pepper onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
5. Brush the skewers with a bit of olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
8. Serve with a side of rice, salad, or rye bread for a complete meal.
